content_body: It started on Friday, leaving at 10:00. We arrived at Fallen Timber Lodge around 2:00, and that's when the party got started. The five couples of the Have and Have Not started singing and dancing. After that, we had a fantastic fish fry. We played cards, Bingo, and much more. On Saturday morning, we got up early, thanking the Lord first for a beautiful day. The Have and Have Not Couples (Ladies) made a famous breakfast. After breakfast, we relaxed, waiting on the Have Not (Men) to grill for the ladies.
title: It Started on Friday...
